Thanks for contributing! Please fill in the sections below.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: refactor without behaviour change
- [ ] perf: performance improvement
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] test: tests only
- [ ] ci / build / chore: tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `ruff check`, `ruff format --check`, and `mypy` pass locally.
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally.
- [ ] Public API changes are documented in docstrings and the README (if user-facing).

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything you'd like a reviewer to focus on. -->
